title: Spicy Norwegian Curry Tofu Bowl
description: A flavorful and spicy curry made with Norwegian influences, served with crispy tofu and served over a bed of fluffy rice.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook until lightly browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Stir in the curry powder and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tofu and cook until golden brown, about 5-6 minutes.
Stir in 1 cup of water and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let simmer for 10-12 minutes.
While the curry is simmering, cook the brown rice according to package instructions.
Serve the curry over the rice and garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
